input_candidates.truth_value: Slip band spacing refined with strain, saturating at ~50 nm for all samples; earlier saturation in finer-grained samples led to earlier microband formation and slight ductility loss.

input_candidates.truth_value: Three-staged strain-hardening behavior: initial drop (stage I) due to glide plane softening, increase (stage II) from slip band refinement and long-range stress, slow decline (stage III) from microband formation.
input_candidates.prediction_value: Reduction of area from tensile tests: HR45 63.0 ± 1.0%, HR68 63.0 ± 0.0%, HR82 61.5 ± 0.3%.

input_candidates.truth_value: Fractography: all samples showed ductile fracture with dimples and microvoids; intergranular (Nb,Mo,W)C particles act as microcrack nucleation sites, but effect mitigated by debonding of intragranular particles.
